script_text: Add an E to the end of cap. What word do you get?
The E makes the A say its name: AY!
What does hop become with a Magic E at the end?
Hop plus e = hope. The O says OH!
Which word has a Magic E?
Magic E is at the end. It makes the vowel say its name!
The word kite has which vowel sound?
Magic E makes I say its name: EYE!
What happens to the E in a Magic E word?
Magic E does not make a sound. But it changes the vowel before it!
